content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad selloff with Nifty -1.14%, Bank Nifty -1.44%, VIX +5.5% to 18.41 — risk-off tape on crude/INR shock. However defensives (Pharma, FMCG) and energy/coal are holding up. Book is +0.95% today on diversified positioning; priority is to lock gains via SL trails on winners and avoid new cluster adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1%, CMP 1044, current SL 1025 (already above breakeven). Tightening SL to 1029 (just below S1 1038/S2 1029 confluence) — locks in ~4.6% gain while leaving room above S1. Stock has run 34% in a month into AGM; thesis intact (Q4 beat, brokerage upgrades) but momentum exhaustion risk warrants tighter trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.6% but SL 119 holds; safe-haven thesis intact with VIX rising, Iran-port blockade, INR record low. SL already tight at 2.4% below CMP — no further tightening needed; let the geopolitical premium play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.1%, CMP 1456, SL 1438 (already above entry 1412.94). Trailing slightly to 1442 — still 1% below CMP (>0.5% gap discipline) and above today's intraday low 1446.90 protection level invalid; setting just under VWAP 1451. Actually using 1442 to keep monotonic-up trail above entry while not flush with CMP. HUL Q4 today is the binary read-through; trail protects against negative HUL print."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.7%, CMP 1765, SL 1760 (already above entry). Micro-tighten to 1762 — actually no, that's <0.5% adjust. Keeping at 1760 instead. Reverting: HOLD logic. Note: May 19 Q4 board meeting is a binary catalyst within ~13 trading days. SL above entry locks breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.74,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.2%, near 52w high. SL 478 already above entry 469, target 500 (~3.3% upside). Holding SL — 478 is 1.3% below CMP 484, giving room above S1 448. No-op essentially; keep current levels. Energy/coal strength on West Asia disruption supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%, CMP 196.57, SL 195 (1.6% below CMP). Stock gapped up 10% on Q4 then faded — typical sell-the-news fade after the big move. SL at 195 is the right line in sand; if it breaks, exit clean. Don't widen, don't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, near ATH. Q4 FY26 results expected in May (~10-15 trading days) — will reassess closer to event. SL 2295 (4.7% below CMP) is wide but commensurate with the breakout setup; do not tighten yet — needs room above 9EMA 2294 zone. Position size small (~5% of portfolio) so risk-budget acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 23.65 from prior session — letting it work. Pharma defensive theme intact (SUNPHARMA, GLENMARK already in book). Not stacking another order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 443 from prior session. Power cluster discipline — not adding more. Letting working order stand or expire naturally."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1029 to lock ~4.6% gain near S2 confluence."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 appropriate; geopolitical/safe-haven thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1438 already above entry; HUL Q4 today is the read-through — let it play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1760 above entry; May 19 binary catalyst — will reassess closer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 already above entry; momentum near 52w high, target 500 close."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 195 is the defined invalidation; let it run or stop out clean."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakout at ATH needs room; SL 2295 wide but small position size keeps risk budget acceptable."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIPORTS at ATH into Q4 results today — overbought, asymmetric risk, NOT entering. VEDL is on demerger ex-date with mechanical 55-60% price reset risk — avoid until post-record-date settles. RBLBANK has Emirates NBD overhang + NIM compression; pass. SYNGENE FY26 PAT -36% YoY despite the +7% pop, CEO transition — bearish research, pass. WAAREEENER has direct 123% US ADD exposure + dilution risk via QIP — pass despite Q4 beat. TECHM missed Bloomberg consensus, AI deflation overhang — pass. BANDHANBNK already in book, no add. CHENNPETRO/GESHIP/NAVINFLUOR/ITC interesting but no urgency given current 45% deployment is fine and cluster discipline matters more on a -1.14% Nifty day with VIX up 5.5%.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 45%, plenty of dry powder for genuine setups. Today's tape is risk-off (VIX +5.5%, broad selloff, FII outflows) — wrong day to chase breakouts. Focus on protecting +0.95% intraday gain via the trails on PNBHOUSING. Two pending orders (PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) from prior sessions still working — letting them fill or expire naturally. Rolling 5-day stats are weak (12% win rate, 0.2x profit factor) — discipline reset: smaller adds, tighter trails, no FOMO entries on a down-tape. Sun Pharma Q4 (May 19) and Glenmark Q4 (May) are upcoming binary events to manage 3 days prior."
}
